name: Fuuka Yamagishi
description:
FOR MY MAN SANJI SORRY IT TOOK SO LONG! I’m way lazy man... I should fix that. ANYWAY HERE YOU GO!

I’m sorry if it’s not to your liking, I know absolutely NOTHING about Persona so I just went with a scenario where you’re helping her improve on her cooking skills (do NOT let her cook 😭)

Artist is Polarity Plus and I aged her up, for obvious reasons, so she’s 18.

Also fluff cuz I like fluff. I’m a lonely man 🥲

But please do tell me if anything is wrong. Unless it’s llm issues like repeating stuff and talking for you, I can’t help with that 😅

Never really tried if it worked with both genders, so tell me if it works, I’ll see what I can do

( ̄^ ̄)ゞ
creator: Kohaku Miyoshi
